tagline: Locally built fences that hold the line — 30 years of craftsmanship in Locust Grove, GA.
address: 3525 S Ola Rd, Locust Grove, GA 30248
services_intro: Wood, chain-link, and custom gates — built to last and installed by the same hands for three decades.
service_1_desc: Custom-built wood privacy and picket fencing for residential yards, a Bridges Fencing specialty for 30 years.
service_2_desc: Durable chain-link and metal fence installation for residential and commercial property lines.
service_3_desc: Custom gate installation plus repair of existing fencing, decks, and posts.
review_1_quote: Built our backyard privacy fence and it looks great — fair price, showed up on time, cleaned up after the job.
review_1_author: Sample testimonial — replace with a verified review
review_2_quote: Needed a long chain-link run for the property line and the crew handled it quickly with solid posts and straight lines.
review_2_author: Sample testimonial — replace with a verified review
review_3_quote: Called them to repair a gate and they fixed it right the first time and explained exactly what was wrong.
review_3_author: Sample testimonial — replace with a verified review
about_paragraph: For 30 years, Bridges Fencing has been building and repairing fences for families and businesses across Locust Grove and Henry County. We're a hands-on operation — the person who quotes your job is the same person who builds it. From wood privacy fences to chain-link runs and custom gates, we do honest work, charge a fair price, and stand behind every post we set. Give us a call and let's talk about your property.
